nasb.text: of the sons of Phinehas, Gershom; of the sons of Ithamar, Daniel; of the sons of David, Hattush;

esv.text: Of the sons of Phinehas, Gershom. Of the sons of Ithamar, Daniel. Of the sons of David, Hattush.

cnv.text: 屬非尼哈的子孫有革順，屬以他瑪的子孫有但以理，屬大衛的子孫有哈突，

ccb.text: 非尼哈的子孙有革顺；以他玛的子孙有但以理；大卫的子孙有哈突；
